caption: Did you know your cells have their own powerhouses? 🌟 Mitochondria are the key to energy production, and having more of them can boost your overall health! 💪 Here are 5 facts about mitochondria: 📝 1) They're found in every cell, 2) Their function declines with age, 3) Exercise increases their production, 4) A healthy diet supports their function, and 5) They play a crucial role in disease prevention. 🌿 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you! 💕
